ModMetaData.name: Common Mod Compatibility Patches
ModMetaData.author: RunningBugs
ModMetaData.description:
A small collection of runtime compatibility patches for commonly used RimWorld mods. Every target-mod patch is dynamically detected at startup: if the corresponding mod/type/method is absent, the patch is skipped silently.
Current patches: - RimWorld music: when recent-song filtering leaves only zero-commonality special-use songs, clear the recent-song filter so vanilla can choose a normal positive-weight song instead of returning null and spamming red errors. - Allow Tool: guard stale cached Haul Urgently things before RimWorld hauling APIs. - Build From Inventory / Replace Stuff: guard vanilla pathfinder reservation notifications for inventory-held or unspawned reservation targets. - Build From Inventory: clamp impossible HaulToContainer reservation stack counts after inventory drops. - Replace Stuff / TinyTweaks: guard Replace Stuff automatic bridge placement helper against null/invalid blueprint contexts. - Replace Stuff / TinyTweaks: guard Replace Stuff over-mineable blueprint helper against null/invalid blueprint contexts. - TinyTweaks: skip auto-rebuild blueprint placement when a launched building has no previous map context. - RimStory: guard broken saved individual-death anniversary events (ADead) with missing/invalid pawns and suppress exceptions from that event path. - Vanilla Expanded Framework: serialize RimWorld goodwill-situation cache access and rebuild the cache if concurrent access has already corrupted it. - [NL] Dynamic Portraits: skip unsafe work-item overlays for job targets with incomplete ThingDef/graphic data and suppress residual DrawWorkItems UI exceptions. - NewRatkinPlus: replace wandering-caravan cleanup with a null-safe equivalent so stale saved settler-pool references do not call Dictionary.Remove(null) during the Ratkin wandering trader incident. - Anomaly Invoke Horax ritual: snapshot invoker inventory offerings before transferring them to the carry tracker and safely consume carried/inventory offerings at ritual end, avoiding collection-modified and unaccounted-offering errors.
Target mods are listed under loadAfter, not as dependencies, so this mod can stay enabled even when some target mods are not installed.
